    total_b=$(ls "$BRIDGE_DIR"/*.md 2>/dev/null | wc -l)
    total_t=$(ls "$BRIDGE_DIR"/*.txt 2>/dev/null | wc -l)
    echo "  Markdown: $total_b"

else
    echo "  No bridge directory found"
